title: boltonia asteroides var. latisquama
intro: Boltonia asteroides var. latisquama, also known as White Doll's Daisy or False Aster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, characterized by its white, daisy-like flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The medicinal properties of Boltonia asteroides var. latisquama have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote relaxation, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves and then infusing them in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
